mapper.update: TRUNCATE TABLE stg_company, stg_company_item, stg_patent, stg_classification, stg_certification, stg_subsidy, stg_commendation, stg_procurement, stg_base_info, stg_women_activity, stg_compat_childcare, stg_finance, stg_major_shareholder, stg_management_index

TRUNCATE TABLE run_company, run_company_item, run_patent, run_classification, run_certification, run_subsidy, run_commendation, run_procurement, run_finance, run_major_shareholder, run_management_index
INSERT INTO run_company (corporate_number) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number FROM stg_company WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_company_item (corporate_number, value, is_industry) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, value, is_industry FROM stg_company_item WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND value IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO run_patent (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_patent WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_classification (patent_merge_key, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT patent_merge_key, merge_key FROM stg_classification WHERE patent_merge_key IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_certification (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_certification WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO run_subsidy (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_subsidy WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_commendation (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_commendation WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_procurement (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_procurement WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO run_finance (corporate_number, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT corporate_number, merge_key FROM stg_finance WHERE corporate_number IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_major_shareholder (finance_merge_key, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT finance_merge_key, merge_key FROM stg_major_shareholder WHERE finance_merge_key IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO run_management_index (finance_merge_key, merge_key) SELECT DISTINCT finance_merge_key, merge_key FROM stg_management_index WHERE finance_merge_key IS NOT NULL AND merge_key IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
